name: Hide and Seek Game
description: Presenting you with the best classic hide and seek, stylishly. Play this strategy game either as a hider or a seeker. Use shelters from phone booths or office desks, hide while swimming in the water, in the hay pile, in the cradle, behind walls, or anywhere you feel safe. Hide and seek is one of the most enjoyable games for kids and families, both in old and modern times. We provide the best hide-and-seek game to have fun anywhere, anytime.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
